–°–µ–≥–Њ–і–љ—П —П –њ–Њ–Ї–∞–ґ—Г –≤–∞–Љ –Ї–∞–Ї –ї—О–і–Є –ґ–Є–≤—Г—В –≤ –Њ–і–љ–Њ–є –Є–Ј —Б–∞–Љ—Л—Е –і–Є–Ї–Є—Е —Б—В—А–∞–љ –љ–µ —В–Њ–ї—М–Ї–Њ –Р—Д—А–Є–Ї–Є, –љ–Њ –Є –≤—Б–µ–≥–Њ –Љ–Є—А–∞ - –Ѓ–ґ–љ—Л–є –°—Г–і–∞–љ. –®–Ї–Њ–ї—Л –≤ –і–∞–ї–µ–Ї–Є—Е —Б–µ–ї–∞—Е - —Н—В–Њ –±–Њ–ї—М—И–Њ–µ –і–µ—А–µ–≤–Њ, –њ–Њ–і –Ї–Њ—В–Њ—А—Л–Љ —Б–Њ–±–Є—А–∞–µ—В—Б—П —Б–Њ—В–љ—П –і–µ—В–µ–є –Є —Г—З–∞—В –∞–ї—Д–∞–≤–Є—В —Б –µ–і–Є–љ—Б—В–≤–µ–љ–љ–Њ–є –і–Њ—Б–Ї–Њ–є. –Ь–љ–Њ–≥–Є–µ –і–µ—В–Є –Ј–і–µ—Б—М –љ–Є–Ї–Њ–≥–і–∞ –љ–µ –і–µ—А–ґ–∞–ї–Є –≤ —А—Г–Ї–∞—Е –њ—А–Њ—Б—В–Њ–≥–Њ –Ј–µ—А–Ї–∞–ї–∞ –Є –≤ —Б–≤–Њ–Є 10-12 –ї–µ—В –љ–Є —А–∞–Ј—Г –Њ—В—З–µ—В–ї–Є–≤–Њ –љ–µ –≤–Є–і–µ–ї–Є –Ї–∞–Ї –Њ–љ–Є –≤—Л–≥–ї—П–і—П—В, –њ–Њ—Н—В–Њ–Љ—Г –Ї–Њ–≥–і–∞ —Д–Њ—В–Њ–≥—А–∞—Д–Є—А—Г–µ—И—М –Є—Е –Є –њ–Њ–Ї–∞–Ј—Л–≤–∞–µ—И—М –Є–Љ —Б–љ–Є–Љ–Њ–Ї - —А–∞–і—Г—О—В—Б—П –і–Њ –±–µ–Ј—Г–Љ–Є—П. –С–Њ–ї—М—И–∞—П —З–∞—Б—В—М –љ–∞—Б–µ–ї–µ–љ–Є—П –ґ–Є–≤–µ—В –≤–і–∞–ї–Є –Њ—В —Ж–Є–≤–Є–ї–Є–Ј–∞—Ж–Є–Є, –≥–і–µ –≤ –Њ–і–љ–Њ–є –Є —В–Њ–є –ґ–µ –ї—Г–ґ–µ –Љ–Њ–≥—Г—В —Б–њ–Њ–Ї–Њ–є–љ–Њ –Љ—Л—В—М –Љ–Њ—В–Њ—Ж–Є–Ї–ї –Є —З–Є—Б—В–Є—В—М –Ј—Г–±—Л, –њ—А–Њ—Е–Њ–ґ–Є–є –≤—Б–µ–≥–і–∞ –Љ–Њ–ґ–µ—В –њ—А–Є–ї–µ—З—М –љ–∞ –≥–Њ—А–µ –Љ—Г—Б–Њ—А–∞, –њ–Њ—Б–њ–∞—В—М –њ–Њ—Б–ї–µ –Њ–±–µ–і–∞ –Є —Н—В–Њ –±—Л –Ї–∞–Ј–∞–ї–Њ—Б—М –±–µ–Ј–Њ–±–Є–і–љ—Л–Љ, –µ—Б–ї–Є –±—Л —Г –Ї–∞–ґ–і–Њ–≥–Њ –њ–Њ–і –њ–Њ–і—Г—И–Ї–Њ–є –љ–µ –±—Л–ї–Њ –∞–≤—В–Њ–Љ–∞—В–∞.

–Т–Є–і–µ–Њ –Ш–ї—М–Є –Т–∞—А–ї–∞–Љ–Њ–≤–∞ –Є–Ј –Ѓ–ґ–љ–Њ–≥–Њ –°—Г–і–∞–љ–∞  https://youtu.be/fy796m48_S8

–Ю–≥—А–Њ–Љ–љ–Њ–µ —Б–њ–∞—Б–Є–±–Њ –Њ—В –Љ–µ–љ—П –≤—Б–µ–є –≥—А—Г–њ–њ–µ, –Ї–Њ—В–Њ—А–∞—П –µ–Ј–і–Є–ї–∞ —Б–Њ –Љ–љ–Њ–є –Є –њ–Њ–і–і–µ—А–ґ–Є–≤–∞–ї–∞ –Љ–Њ—А–∞–ї—М–љ–Њ –Є —Д–Є–Ј–Є—З–µ—Б–Ї–Є. 
–Ы–Є–ї–Є–Є –Є –Ф–Є–Љ–µ –ѓ–љ–Ї–Њ–≤—Б–Ї–Є–Љ, –Ї–Њ—В–Њ—А—Л–µ —В–µ—А–њ–µ–ї–Є –Љ–Њ–Є —Б—К—С–Љ–Ї–Є –≤—Б—О –і–Њ—А–Њ–≥—Г –≤ –Љ–∞—И–Є–љ–µ , –°—В–∞—Б—Г, –Ї–Њ—В–Њ—А—Л–є –≤—Л—А—Г—З–Є–ї, –Ї–Њ–≥–і–∞ —Б–ї–Њ–Љ–∞–ї–∞—Б—М –Ї–∞–Љ–µ—А–∞ (@drutskystas –≤ –Є–љ—Б—В–µ), –Ы—С—И–µ –Ь–Ј—Г–љ–≥—Г - –Ї—А—Г—В–Њ–Љ—Г –≥–Є–і—Г —Б —Б–∞–Љ—Л–Љ–Є —Н–Ї–Ј–Њ—В–Є—З–µ—Б–Ї–Є–Љ–Є –љ–∞–њ—А–∞–≤–ї–µ–љ–Є—П–Љ (https://www.mzunguexpeditions.com), –Ф–Є–Љ–µ –Ы—Г–Ї—М—П–љ—З—Г–Ї—Г (@Dmitry.lukyanchuk - –Ї—А—Г—В–Њ–є –њ—Г—В–µ—И–µ—Б—В–≤–µ–љ–љ–Є–Ї –≤ –Є–љ—Б—В–∞–≥—А–∞–Љ–Љ–µ), –Ь–∞—А–Є–Є (masha_davay) , –Ф–Є–Љ–µ, –†–Є–Љ–Љ–µ, –Ы–µ–Њ–љ–Є–і—Г –Є –≤—Б–µ–Љ –Ї—В–Њ –±—Л–ї —А—П–і–Њ–Љ

snippet.title: President Biden falls on Air Force One stairs
snippet.description:
President Joe Biden has fallen on the stairs of Air Force One while boarding the aircraft.

Mr Biden, who was on his way to Atlanta, appeared unhurt and carried on unaided.

snippet.title: LIVE: GRAMMY Awards Premiere Ceremony | March 14 at 3pm ET / 12pm PT
snippet.description:
MusicвАЩs Biggest Night kicks off with the Premiere Ceremony, featuring 8 special performances and more than 70 GRAMMYs awarded across music genres ranging from classical and jazz to R&B, Global music and more. 

Hosted by current three-time GRAMMY nominee Jhen√© Aiko, the Premiere Ceremony will feature a number of performances by current GRAMMY nominees, including: Nigerian singer, songwriter and rapper Burna Boy, jazz band Terri Lyne Carrington + Social Science, blues musician Jimmy "Duck" Holmes, classical pianist Igor Levit, Latin electropop musician Lido Pimienta, singer, songwriter and performance artist Poppy, and singer, songwriter and composer Rufus Wainwright. 

Kicking off the event will be a tribute performance celebrating the 50th anniversary of the classic Marvin Gaye track "Mercy, Mercy Me (The Ecology)". The special all-nominee ensemble performance will feature Afro-Peruvian Jazz Orchestra, Thana Alexa, John Beasley, Camilo, Regina Carter, Alexandre Desplat, Bebel Gilberto, Lupita Infante, Sarah Jarosz, Mykal Kilgore, Ledisi, Mariachi Sol de Mexico de Jose Hernandez, PJ Morton, Gregory Porter, Grace Potter, s√§je, Gustavo Santaolalla (Bajofondo), Anoushka Shankar, and Kamasi Washington. 

All of the Premiere Ceremony performers and the host are nominated this year, as are most of the presenters. Afro-Peruvian Jazz Orchestra for Best Latin Jazz Album (Tradiciones); Aiko for Album Of The Year (Chilombo), Best R&B Performance ("Lightning & Thunder" featuring John Legend) and Best Progressive R&B Album (Chilombo); Alexa for Best Jazz Vocal Album (Ona); Beasley with Somi With Frankfurt Radio Big Band for Best Jazz Vocal Album (Holy Room: Live At Alte Oper), Best Large Jazz Ensemble Album (MONK'estra Plays John Beasley), Best Arrangement, Instrumental or A Cappella ("Donna Lee") and Best Arrangement, Instrumentals and Vocals ("Asas Fechadas" with Maria Mendes); Burna Boy for Best Global Music Album (Twice As Tall); Burr for Best Comedy Album (Paper Tiger); Camilo for Best Latin Pop or Urban Album (Por Primera Vez); Carrington + Social Science for Best Jazz Instrumental Album (Waiting Game); Carter for Best Improvised Jazz Solo ("Pachamama"); Chika for Best New Artist; Desplat for Best Instrumental Composition ("Plumfield"); Gilberto for Best Global Music Album (Agora); Holmes for Best Traditional Blues Album (Cypress Grove); Infante for Best Regional Mexican Music Album (Including Tejano) (La Serenata); Jarosz for Best American Roots Song ("Hometown"), Best Americana Album (World On The Ground); Kilgore for Best Traditional R&B Performance ("Let Me Go"); Ledisi for Best Traditional R&B Performance ("Anything For You"); Levit for Best Classical Instrumental Solo (Beethoven: Complete Piano Sonatas); Mariachi Sol de Mexico de Jose Hernandez for Best Regional Mexican Music Album (Including Tejano) (Bailando Sones Y Huapangos Con Mariachi Sol De Mexico De Jose Hernandez); Morton for Best Gospel Album (Gospel According To PJ); Pimienta for Best Latin Rock or Alternative Album (Miss Colombia); Poppy for Best Metal Performance ("BLOODMONEY"); Porter for Best R&B Album (All Rise); Potter for Best Rock Performance ("Daylight"), Best Rock Album (Daylight); s√§je for Best Arrangement, Instruments and Vocals ("Desert Song"); Santaolalla with Bajofondo for Best Latin Rock or Alternative Album (Aura); Shankar for Best Global Music Album (Love Letters); Wainwright for Best Traditional Pop Vocal Album (Unfollow The Rules); and Washington for Best Score Soundtrack For Visual Media (Becoming).

19 –Љ–∞—А—В–∞ –Ь–∞–Ї—Б –Є Zivert –≤—Л–њ—Г—Б–Ї–∞—О—В –Є—Б—В–Њ—А–Є—О –Њ–± –Њ–і–Є–љ–Њ—З–µ—Б—В–≤–µ –≤ —Б—В–Є–ї–µ –Ї–Є–±–µ—А–њ–∞–љ–Ї, —В–µ–Љ —Б–∞–Љ—Л–Љ –њ—А–µ–і—Г–≥–∞–і—Л–≤–∞—П –≤–Њ–Ј–≤—А–∞—Й–µ–љ–Є–µ –Љ–Є—А–Њ–≤–Њ–є —В–µ–љ–і–µ–љ—Ж–Є–Є –≤–Њ –≤—Б–µ–≤–Њ–Ј–Љ–Њ–ґ–љ—Л—Е –µ–µ –љ–∞–њ—А–∞–≤–ї–µ–љ–Є—П—Е: –Њ—В –Љ–Њ–і—Л, –Ї–Є–љ–Њ, –∞—А—В–∞ –і–Њ –Љ—Г–Ј—Л–Ї–Є. 

–°–Њ–≤—А–µ–Љ–µ–љ–љ—Л–є –Љ–Є—А —Б—В—А–µ–Љ–Є—В–µ–ї—М–љ–Њ —В–µ—А—П–µ—В —В–∞–Ї—В–Є–ї—М–љ–Њ—Б—В—М, –ї—О–і–Є –і–Њ–±—А–Њ–≤–Њ–ї—М–љ–Њ –Њ—Ж–Є—Д—А–Њ–≤—Л–≤–∞—О—В —Б–≤–Њ–Є —З—Г–≤—Б—В–≤–∞ –Є —Н–Љ–Њ—Ж–Є–Є, –Њ–±–Љ–µ–љ–Є–≤–∞—П –Є—Е –љ–∞ –ї–∞–є–Ї–Є –Є —А–µ–є—В–Є–љ–≥ –≤ —Б–Њ—Ж–Є–∞–ї—М–љ—Л—Е —Б–µ—В—П—Е. –°–Њ—В–љ–Є —В—Л—Б—П—З —Д–Њ—В–Њ–≥—А–∞—Д–Є–є —Б–µ–≥–Њ–і–љ—П –Ј–∞–Љ–µ–љ—П—О—В –њ—А–Є–Ї–Њ—Б–љ–Њ–≤–µ–љ–Є–µ –Є —В–µ–њ–ї–Њ –њ–Њ—Ж–µ–ї—Г—П. –Ъ–ї–Є–њ –Њ–±–ї–∞–і–∞–µ—В –≥–ї—Г–±–Њ–Ї–Є–Љ —Б–Њ—Ж–Є–∞–ї—М–љ—Л–Љ –њ–Њ–і—В–µ–Ї—Б—В–Њ–Љ, –≤ –Ї–Њ—В–Њ—А–Њ–Љ —З–µ–ї–Њ–≤–µ–Ї–∞ —В–Њ—В–∞–ї—М–љ–Њ –њ–Њ–≥–ї–Њ—В–Є–ї–Є —В–µ—Е–љ–Њ–ї–Њ–≥–Є–Є, –∞ –≤–Є—А—В—Г–∞–ї—М–љ–∞—П –ґ–Є–Ј–љ—М –Ј–∞–Љ–µ–љ–Є–ї–∞ —А–µ–∞–ї—М–љ–Њ—Б—В—М. 

–Р–ї–∞–љ—Г –С–∞–і–Њ–µ–≤—Г, –Ь–∞–Ї—Б—Г –С–∞—А—Б–Ї–Є—Е –Є Zivert —Г–і–∞–ї–Њ—Б—М —Б–Њ–Ј–і–∞—В—М –Є—Б—В–Њ—А–Є—О, –≤ –Ї–Њ—В–Њ—А–Њ–є –љ–µ—В —Е—Н–њ–њ–Є-—Н–љ–і–∞. –Ю–љ–∞ –Њ –і–≤—Г—Е –і—Г—И–∞—Е, —В–µ–ї–∞–Љ–Є –Ї–Њ—В–Њ—А—Л—Е —Г–њ—А–∞–≤–ї—П–µ—В ¬Ђ—Б–Є–ї–Є–Ї–Њ–љ–Њ–≤–∞—П –і–Њ–ї–Є–љ–∞¬ї, –Є—Б–Ї—Г—Б—Б—В–≤–µ–љ–љ—Л–є –Є–љ—В–µ–ї–ї–µ–Ї—В. –Т—Б–µ, —З—В–Њ –Њ—Б—В–∞–µ—В—Б—П —Н—В–Є–Љ –≤–ї—О–±–ї–µ–љ–љ—Л–Љ вАФ –≤—Б—В—А–µ—З–Є –≤ –≤–Є—А—В—Г–∞–ї—М–љ—Л—Е —Б–љ–∞—Е –Њ—Ж–Є—Д—А–Њ–≤–∞–љ–љ–Њ–≥–Њ –Љ–Є—А–∞.

–°–ї—Г—И–∞–є #BESTSELLER –љ–∞ –≤—Б–µ—Е –њ–ї–∞—В—Д–Њ—А–Љ–∞—Е: https://sonymusicrussia.lnk.to/BESTSELLER

–Ь–∞–Ї—Б –С–∞—А—Б–Ї–Є—Е –Є Zivert –≤–Њ–Ј–≤—А–∞—Й–∞—О—В –Љ–Њ–і—Г –љ–∞ –Ї–Є–±–µ—А–њ–∞–љ–Ї –≤ –љ–Њ–≤–Њ–Љ –Ї–ї–Є–њ–µ ¬ЂBestseller¬ї

–Ф–Њ–ї–≥–Њ–ґ–і–∞–љ–љ—Л–є —Б–Њ—О–Ј –С–∞—А—Б–Ї–Є—Е –Є Zivert, –Ї–Њ—В–Њ—А—Л–є –Ј–∞–і–Њ–ї–≥–Њ –і–Њ —Б–≤–Њ–µ–≥–Њ –њ–Њ—П–≤–ї–µ–љ–Є—П –љ–∞ —Ж–Є—Д—А–Њ–≤—Л—Е –њ–ї–Њ—Й–∞–і–Ї–∞—Е –њ–Њ–ї—Г—З–Є–ї —Б—В–∞—В—Г—Б –±–µ—Б—В—Б–µ–ї–ї–µ—А–∞, —Г–ґ–µ –і–Њ—Б—В—Г–њ–µ–љ –љ–∞ –Њ—Д–Є—Ж–Є–∞–ї—М–љ–Њ–Љ YouTube-–Ї–∞–љ–∞–ї–µ –Ь–∞–Ї—Б–∞. 

–†–Њ–≤–љ–Њ –≥–Њ–і –њ–Њ–љ–∞–і–Њ–±–Є–ї—Б—П –∞—А—В–Є—Б—В–∞–Љ –љ–∞ —Б–Њ–Ј–і–∞–љ–Є–µ —Н—В–Њ–≥–Њ –і—Г—Н—В–∞. –С–Њ–ї—М—И–µ —И–µ—Б—В–Є –Љ–µ—Б—П—Ж–µ–≤ —Г—И–ї–Њ –љ–∞ –њ–µ—Б–љ—О, –Њ—Б—В–∞–ї—М–љ–Њ–µ –≤—А–µ–Љ—П –Ј–∞–љ—П–ї–∞ —А–∞–±–Њ—В–∞ –љ–∞–і –Ї–ї–Є–њ–Њ–Љ. 

19 –Љ–∞—А—В–∞ –Ь–∞–Ї—Б –Є Zivert –≤—Л–њ—Г—Б–Ї–∞—О—В –Є—Б—В–Њ—А–Є—О –Њ–± –Њ–і–Є–љ–Њ—З–µ—Б—В–≤–µ –≤ —Б—В–Є–ї–µ –Ї–Є–±–µ—А–њ–∞–љ–Ї, —В–µ–Љ —Б–∞–Љ—Л–Љ –њ—А–µ–і—Г–≥–∞–і—Л–≤–∞—П –≤–Њ–Ј–≤—А–∞—Й–µ–љ–Є–µ –Љ–Є—А–Њ–≤–Њ–є —В–µ–љ–і–µ–љ—Ж–Є–Є –≤–Њ –≤—Б–µ–≤–Њ–Ј–Љ–Њ–ґ–љ—Л—Е –µ–µ –љ–∞–њ—А–∞–≤–ї–µ–љ–Є—П—Е: –Њ—В –Љ–Њ–і—Л, –Ї–Є–љ–Њ, –∞—А—В–∞ –і–Њ –Љ—Г–Ј—Л–Ї–Є. 

–°–Њ–≤—А–µ–Љ–µ–љ–љ—Л–є –Љ–Є—А —Б—В—А–µ–Љ–Є—В–µ–ї—М–љ–Њ —В–µ—А—П–µ—В —В–∞–Ї—В–Є–ї—М–љ–Њ—Б—В—М, –ї—О–і–Є –і–Њ–±—А–Њ–≤–Њ–ї—М–љ–Њ –Њ—Ж–Є—Д—А–Њ–≤—Л–≤–∞—О—В —Б–≤–Њ–Є —З—Г–≤—Б—В–≤–∞ –Є —Н–Љ–Њ—Ж–Є–Є, –Њ–±–Љ–µ–љ–Є–≤–∞—П –Є—Е –љ–∞ –ї–∞–є–Ї–Є –Є —А–µ–є—В–Є–љ–≥ –≤ —Б–Њ—Ж–Є–∞–ї—М–љ—Л—Е —Б–µ—В—П—Е. –°–Њ—В–љ–Є —В—Л—Б—П—З —Д–Њ—В–Њ–≥—А–∞—Д–Є–є —Б–µ–≥–Њ–і–љ—П –Ј–∞–Љ–µ–љ—П—О—В –њ—А–Є–Ї–Њ—Б–љ–Њ–≤–µ–љ–Є–µ –Є —В–µ–њ–ї–Њ –њ–Њ—Ж–µ–ї—Г—П. –Ъ–ї–Є–њ –Њ–±–ї–∞–і–∞–µ—В –≥–ї—Г–±–Њ–Ї–Є–Љ —Б–Њ—Ж–Є–∞–ї—М–љ—Л–Љ –њ–Њ–і—В–µ–Ї—Б—В–Њ–Љ, –≤ –Ї–Њ—В–Њ—А–Њ–Љ —З–µ–ї–Њ–≤–µ–Ї–∞ —В–Њ—В–∞–ї—М–љ–Њ –њ–Њ–≥–ї–Њ—В–Є–ї–Є —В–µ—Е–љ–Њ–ї–Њ–≥–Є–Є, –∞ –≤–Є—А—В—Г–∞–ї—М–љ–∞—П –ґ–Є–Ј–љ—М –Ј–∞–Љ–µ–љ–Є–ї–∞ —А–µ–∞–ї—М–љ–Њ—Б—В—М. 

–Р–ї–∞–љ—Г –С–∞–і–Њ–µ–≤—Г, –Ь–∞–Ї—Б—Г –С–∞—А—Б–Ї–Є—Е –Є Zivert —Г–і–∞–ї–Њ—Б—М —Б–Њ–Ј–і–∞—В—М –Є—Б—В–Њ—А–Є—О, –≤ –Ї–Њ—В–Њ—А–Њ–є –љ–µ—В —Е—Н–њ–њ–Є-—Н–љ–і–∞. –Ю–љ–∞ –Њ –і–≤—Г—Е –і—Г—И–∞—Е, —В–µ–ї–∞–Љ–Є –Ї–Њ—В–Њ—А—Л—Е —Г–њ—А–∞–≤–ї—П–µ—В ¬Ђ—Б–Є–ї–Є–Ї–Њ–љ–Њ–≤–∞—П –і–Њ–ї–Є–љ–∞¬ї, –Є—Б–Ї—Г—Б—Б—В–≤–µ–љ–љ—Л–є –Є–љ—В–µ–ї–ї–µ–Ї—В. –Т—Б–µ, —З—В–Њ –Њ—Б—В–∞–µ—В—Б—П —Н—В–Є–Љ –≤–ї—О–±–ї–µ–љ–љ—Л–Љ вАФ –≤—Б—В—А–µ—З–Є –≤ –≤–Є—А—В—Г–∞–ї—М–љ—Л—Е —Б–љ–∞—Е –Њ—Ж–Є—Д—А–Њ–≤–∞–љ–љ–Њ–≥–Њ –Љ–Є—А–∞.

snippet.title: losing control : Dancing with the Devil
snippet.description:
вАЬI crossed a line IвАЩd never crossed in addiction.вАЭ 

In part I of this fearless documentary series, Demi Lovato and her family and friends candidly open up for the first time about what led to her near-fatal overdose.

Resources:
 
The National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA) helpline
1-800-931-2237 (they also offer click-to-chat messaging) 
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org
 
SAMHSA Hotline for individuals and family members facing mental health and/or substance use disorders
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
If you need immediate support, please reach out to your local crisis text line:
USA: Text HOME to 741741
UK: Text SHOUT to 85258
Canada: Text CONNECT to 686868 or 741741

Pre-order Demi LovatoвАЩs new album вАШDancing With The DevilвА¶ The Art Of Starting OverвАЩ https://DemiLovato.lnk.to/DWTDTAOSOID

id.title: Kehilangan Kendali : Dancing with the Devil
id.description:
вАЬAku melewati batas yang tak pernah aku lewati karena kecanduan.вАЭ

Di bagian I dari serial dokumenter yang tak kenal takut ini, Demi Lovato, bersama keluarga dan teman-temannya, terus terang terbuka untuk pertama kali tentang apa yang menuntunnya pada overdosis yang nyaris mematikan.

Sumber:

Saluran bantuan National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA)
1-800-931-2237 (mereka juga menawarkan perpesanan klik-untuk-obrolan)
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org

Saluran siaga SAMHSA untuk perorangan dan anggota keluarga yang mengalami gangguan kesehatan mental dan/atau penggunaan substansi
1-800-662-HELP (4357)
TTY: 1-800-487-4889

Jika kau memerlukan dukungan segera, silakan menghubungi saluran teks krisis daerahmu:
AS: Ketik HOME kirim ke 741741
Britania Raya: Ketik SHOUT kirim ke 85258
Kanada: Ketik CONNECT kirim ke 686868 atau 741741

"–Р–љ–і—А–µ–є –Ь–∞–ї–∞—Е–Њ–≤. –Я—А—П–Љ–Њ–є —Н—Д–Є—А" вАУ –љ–∞—Б—В–Њ—П—Й–∞—П —Е—А–Њ–љ–Є–Ї–∞ –љ–∞—И–µ–є –ґ–Є–Ј–љ–Є. –≠—В–Њ –њ—А–Њ–≥—А–∞–Љ–Љ–∞ –Њ –Ї–∞–ґ–і–Њ–Љ –Є–Ј –љ–∞—Б: –Њ —В–Њ–Љ, —З—В–Њ –љ–∞—Б –≤–Њ–ї–љ—Г–µ—В –Є —З–µ–Љ –ґ–Є–≤–µ—В —Б—В—А–∞–љ–∞. –Х–ґ–µ–і–љ–µ–≤–љ–Њ –њ–Њ –±—Г–і–љ—П–Љ –≤ —Б—В—Г–і–Є–Є "–Я—А—П–Љ–Њ–≥–Њ —Н—Д–Є—А–∞" —Б–∞–Љ—Л–µ –≥—А–Њ–Љ–Ї–Є–µ –ґ—Г—А–љ–∞–ї–Є—Б—В—Б–Ї–Є–µ —А–∞—Б—Б–ї–µ–і–Њ–≤–∞–љ–Є—П, –∞–Ї—В—Г–∞–ї—М–љ—Л–µ —Б–Њ–±—Л—В–Є—П, —Б–µ–љ—Б–∞—Ж–Є–Є –Є–Ј –Љ–Є—А–∞ –Ј–≤–µ–Ј–і –Є –ї—О–і–Є, –Ї–Њ—В–Њ—А—Л–Љ –љ—Г–ґ–љ–∞ –љ–∞—И–∞ –њ–Њ–Љ–Њ—Й—М. –Ґ–Њ–ї—М–Ї–Њ –≤ "–Я—А—П–Љ–Њ–Љ —Н—Д–Є—А–µ" –Љ–Њ–ґ–љ–Њ –Є–Ј —Г—Б—В –љ–µ–њ–Њ—Б—А–µ–і—Б—В–≤–µ–љ–љ—Л—Е —Г—З–∞—Б—В–љ–Є–Ї–Њ–≤ –Є –Њ—З–µ–≤–Є–і—Ж–µ–≤ —Г–Ј–љ–∞—В—М –Њ –њ—А–Њ–±–ї–µ–Љ–∞—Е, –Ї–Њ—В–Њ—А—Л–µ –≤–Њ–ї–љ—Г—О—В –Ї–∞–ґ–і–Њ–≥–Њ.

–Ф–ї—П –Р–љ–і—А–µ—П –Ь–∞–ї–∞—Е–Њ–≤–∞ –љ–µ —Б—Г—Й–µ—Б—В–≤—Г–µ—В –љ–µ—А–∞–Ј—А–µ—И–Є–Љ—Л—Е –≤–Њ–њ—А–Њ—Б–Њ–≤. –Т–Њ –≤—А–µ–Љ—П "–Я—А—П–Љ–Њ–≥–Њ —Н—Д–Є—А–∞" —А–∞—Б–Ї—А—Л–≤–∞—О—В—Б—П –Ј–∞–њ—Г—В–∞–љ–љ—Л–µ –Ј–∞–≥–∞–і–Ї–Є –њ—А–Њ—И–ї–Њ–≥–Њ, –≤—Л—П–≤–ї—П—О—В—Б—П –њ—А–∞–≤—Л–µ –Є –≤–Є–љ–Њ–≤–∞—В—Л–µ –≤ —Б–∞–Љ—Л—Е —Б–ї–Њ–ґ–љ—Л—Е –Ї–Њ–љ—Д–ї–Є–Ї—В–∞—Е, –∞ –ї—О–і–Є, –њ–Њ—В–µ—А—П–≤—И–Є–µ –љ–∞–і–µ–ґ–і—Г, –Њ–±—А–µ—В–∞—О—В –µ–µ –≤–љ–Њ–≤—М!

–Я—П—В—М –Љ–Є–ї–ї–Є–∞—А–і–Њ–≤ –і–Њ–ї–ї–∞—А–Њ–≤ –≤ –≥–Њ–і вАФ —Б—В–Њ–ї—М–Ї–Њ –Љ–Њ–ґ–µ—В –њ–Њ—В–µ—А—П—В—М –†–Њ—Б—Б–Є—П –Є–Ј-–Ј–∞ –љ–Њ–≤—Л—Е —Б–∞–љ–Ї—Ж–Є–є –°–®–Р, –Ї–Њ—В–Њ—А—Л–µ –њ–Њ–ї–љ–Њ—Б—В—М—О –Ј–∞–њ—А–µ—Й–∞—О—В —Н–Ї—Б–њ–Њ—А—В –Є –Є–Љ–њ–Њ—А—В –Њ—А—Г–ґ–Є—П –Є –Њ–±–Њ—А–Њ–љ–љ—Л—Е —Г—Б–ї—Г–≥ –Љ–µ–ґ–і—Г —Б—В—А–∞–љ–∞–Љ–Є.

–°–≤–µ—В–ї–∞–љ–∞ –Ґ–Є—Е–∞–љ–Њ–≤—Б–Ї–∞—П –Њ–±—К—П–≤–Є–ї–∞ –Њ –Ј–∞–њ—Г—Б–Ї–µ –Њ–љ–ї–∞–є–љ-–≥–Њ–ї–Њ—Б–Њ–≤–∞–љ–Є—П –Ј–∞ –њ–µ—А–µ–≥–Њ–≤–Њ—А—Л —Б –≤–ї–∞—Б—В—П–Љ–Є –С–µ–ї–∞—А—Г—Б–Є –њ—А–Є –Љ–µ–ґ–і—Г–љ–∞—А–Њ–і–љ–Њ–Љ –њ–Њ—Б—А–µ–і–љ–Є–Ї–µ. –Я–Њ –µ–µ —Б–ї–Њ–≤–∞–Љ, —Н—В–Њ–Љ—Г –≥–Њ—В–Њ–≤—Л —Б–њ–Њ—Б–Њ–±—Б—В–≤–Њ–≤–∞—В—М –Ю–С–°–Х –Є –Ю–Ю–Э. –Ґ–Є—Е–∞–љ–Њ–≤—Б–Ї–∞—П –≥–Њ—В–Њ–≤–Є–ї–∞—Б—М –Ї —Н—В–Њ–Љ—Г —Б–µ–Љ—М –Љ–µ—Б—П—Ж–µ–≤.

snippet.description:
https://free.navalny.com

–Ь—Л –Ј–∞–њ—Г—Б–Ї–∞–µ–Љ –Ї–∞–Љ–њ–∞–љ–Є—О –њ–Њ –Њ—Б–≤–Њ–±–Њ–ґ–і–µ–љ–Є—О –Р–ї–µ–Ї—Б–µ—П –Э–∞–≤–∞–ї—М–љ–Њ–≥–Њ.

–Э–∞—И–∞ –±–ї–Є–ґ–∞–є—И–∞—П –Ј–∞–і–∞—З–∞ - –Њ–±—Й–µ—А–Њ—Б—Б–Є–є—Б–Ї–Є–є –Љ–Є—В–Є–љ–≥ —Н—В–Њ–є –≤–µ—Б–љ–Њ–є. –Я—А–Є–љ—Ж–Є–њ–Є–∞–ї—М–љ–Њ –і—А—Г–≥–Њ–є –Љ–Є—В–Є–љ–≥ - –Њ –Ї–Њ—В–Њ—А–Њ–Љ —Г–Ј–љ–∞—О—В –≤—Б–µ –Є –Ї–Њ—В–Њ—А—Л–є —Г –Я—Г—В–Є–љ–∞ –љ–µ –њ–Њ–ї—Г—З–Є—В—Б—П —А–∞–Ј–Њ–≥–љ–∞—В—М. 

–Ь—Л¬†–≤–Є–і–Є–Љ, —З—В–Њ –њ–Њ –Њ–њ—А–Њ—Б–∞–Љ –і–µ—Б—П—В–Ї–Є –Љ–Є–ї–ї–Є–Њ–љ–Њ–≤ —З–µ–ї–Њ–≤–µ–Ї –Њ–і–Њ–±—А—П—О—В –њ—А–Њ—В–µ—Б—В–љ—Л–µ –∞–Ї—Ж–Є–Є, –љ–Њ –Ї–Њ–≥–і–∞ –Њ–љ–Є –њ—А–Њ–Є—Б—Е–Њ–і—П—В —Б–њ–Њ–љ—В–∞–љ–љ–Њ, –љ–µ –≤—Б–µ —Г—Б–њ–µ–≤–∞—О—В –Њ –љ–Є—Е —Г–Ј–љ–∞—В—М, –љ–µ –≤—Б–µ –Љ–Њ–≥—Г—В –њ—А–Є–є—В–Є, –∞ –Љ–љ–Њ–≥–Є–µ –њ—А–Њ—Б—В–Њ –±–Њ—П—В—Б—П. –Я–Њ—Н—В–Њ–Љ—Г –≤ —Н—В–Њ—В —А–∞–Ј –Љ—Л –њ–Њ—Б—В—Г–њ–Є–Љ –Є–љ–∞—З–µ. 

–Ь—Л –љ–µ –љ–∞–Ј–љ–∞—З–∞–µ–Љ —Б–µ–є—З–∞—Б –Ї–Њ–љ–Ї—А–µ—В–љ–Њ–є –і–∞—В—Л.¬†–Я–µ—А–≤—Л–є —И–∞–≥ –љ–∞—И–µ–є –Ї–∞–Љ–њ–∞–љ–Є–Є вАФ —А–∞—Б—Б–Ї–∞–Ј–∞—В—М –Њ –Љ–Є—В–Є–љ–≥–µ –≤—Б–µ–є —Б—В—А–∞–љ–µ.¬†–Т—Б–µ –≤–Љ–µ—Б—В–µ –Љ—Л –і–Њ–ї–ґ–љ—Л –Ј–∞–љ—П—В—М—Б—П –Є–љ—Д–Њ—А–Љ–Є—А–Њ–≤–∞–љ–Є–µ–Љ –Є –њ–Њ–і–≥–Њ—В–Њ–≤–Ї–Њ–є, –∞ –і–∞—В—Г –Љ—Л –Њ–њ—А–µ–і–µ–ї–Є–Љ, –Ї–Њ–≥–і–∞ —З–Є—Б–ї–Њ —Г—З–∞—Б—В–љ–Є–Ї–Њ–≤ –і–Њ—Б—В–Є–≥–љ–µ—В –њ–Њ –Ї—А–∞–є–љ–µ–є –Љ–µ—А–µ 500 —В—Л—Б—П—З —З–µ–ї–Њ–≤–µ–Ї.

–Э–∞¬†—Б–∞–є—В–µ  https://free.navalny.com ¬†–Љ—Л¬†–Ј–∞–њ—Г—Б—В–Є–ї–Є –Ї–∞—А—В—Г. –Х—Б–ї–Є –≤—Л¬†—Б—З–Є—В–∞–µ—В–µ, —З—В–Њ –Р–ї–µ–Ї—Б–µ–є –Э–∞–≤–∞–ї—М–љ—Л–є –і–Њ–ї–ґ–µ–љ –±—Л—В—М –љ–µ–Љ–µ–і–ї–µ–љ–љ–Њ –Њ—Б–≤–Њ–±–Њ–ґ–і–µ–љ, –Є¬†–≥–Њ—В–Њ–≤—Л —В—А–µ–±–Њ–≤–∞—В—М —Н—В–Њ–≥–Њ –љ–∞¬†—Г–ї–Є—Ж–µ, —В–Њ¬†–њ–Њ—Б—В–∞–≤—М—В–µ —В–Њ—З–Ї—Г –≤¬†–≥–Њ—А–Њ–і–µ, –≥–і–µ –≤—Л¬†–ґ–Є–≤–µ—В–µ. –Ъ–∞—А—В–∞ –±—Г–і–µ—В –Ј–∞–њ–Њ–ї–љ—П—В—М—Б—П —В–Њ—З–Ї–∞–Љ–Є, –Є¬†–Ї–∞–ґ–і—Л–є, –Ї—В–Њ –њ–Њ—Б—В–∞–≤–Є—В —Б–≤–Њ—О, –±—Г–і–µ—В –Ј–љ–∞—В—М, —З—В–Њ –Њ–љ¬†–љ–µ¬†–Њ–і–Є–љ–Њ–Ї. –І—В–Њ –њ—А—П–Љ–Њ —А—П–і–Њ–Љ —Б¬†–љ–Є–Љ –ґ–Є–≤—Г—В –µ–і–Є–љ–Њ–Љ—Л—И–ї–µ–љ–љ–Є–Ї–Є¬†вАФ –≤¬†—В–Њ–Љ –ґ–µ¬†–і–≤–Њ—А–µ, –љ–∞¬†—В–Њ–є –ґ–µ¬†—Г–ї–Є—Ж–µ. –Ш¬†–Ї–Њ–≥–і–∞ –љ–∞—Б —Б—В–∞–љ–µ—В –і–Њ—Б—В–∞—В–Њ—З–љ–Њ –Љ–љ–Њ–≥–Њ, –Љ—Л¬†–њ—А–Њ–є–і–µ–Љ –Љ–Є—А–љ—Л–Љ —И–µ—Б—В–≤–Є–µ–Љ –њ–Њ¬†—Г–ї–Є—Ж–∞–Љ –≤—Б–µ—Е —А–Њ—Б—Б–Є–є—Б–Ї–Є—Е –≥–Њ—А–Њ–і–Њ–≤.

–Э–µ –±–Њ–є—В–µ—Б—М.¬†–†–µ–≥–Є—Б—В—А–Є—А—Г–є—В–µ—Б—М. –Я—А–Є—Б–Њ–µ–і–Є–љ—П–є—В–µ—Б—М –Ї –љ–∞—И–µ–є –Ї–∞–Љ–њ–∞–љ–Є–Є. 

–†–Њ—Б—Б–Є—П –±—Г–і–µ—В —Б—З–∞—Б—В–ї–Є–≤–Њ–є.

–Ь—Л –Ј–∞–њ—Г—Б–Ї–∞–µ–Љ –Ї–∞–Љ–њ–∞–љ–Є—О –њ–Њ –Њ—Б–≤–Њ–±–Њ–ґ–і–µ–љ–Є—О –Р–ї–µ–Ї—Б–µ—П –Э–∞–≤–∞–ї—М–љ–Њ–≥–Њ.

–Э–∞—И–∞ –±–ї–Є–ґ–∞–є—И–∞—П –Ј–∞–і–∞—З–∞ - –Њ–±—Й–µ—А–Њ—Б—Б–Є–є—Б–Ї–Є–є –Љ–Є—В–Є–љ–≥ —Н—В–Њ–є –≤–µ—Б–љ–Њ–є. –Я—А–Є–љ—Ж–Є–њ–Є–∞–ї—М–љ–Њ –і—А—Г–≥–Њ–є –Љ–Є—В–Є–љ–≥ - –Њ –Ї–Њ—В–Њ—А–Њ–Љ —Г–Ј–љ–∞—О—В –≤—Б–µ –Є –Ї–Њ—В–Њ—А—Л–є —Г –Я—Г—В–Є–љ–∞ –љ–µ –њ–Њ–ї—Г—З–Є—В—Б—П —А–∞–Ј–Њ–≥–љ–∞—В—М. 

–Ь—Л¬†–≤–Є–і–Є–Љ, —З—В–Њ –њ–Њ –Њ–њ—А–Њ—Б–∞–Љ –і–µ—Б—П—В–Ї–Є –Љ–Є–ї–ї–Є–Њ–љ–Њ–≤ —З–µ–ї–Њ–≤–µ–Ї –Њ–і–Њ–±—А—П—О—В –њ—А–Њ—В–µ—Б—В–љ—Л–µ –∞–Ї—Ж–Є–Є, –љ–Њ –Ї–Њ–≥–і–∞ –Њ–љ–Є –њ—А–Њ–Є—Б—Е–Њ–і—П—В —Б–њ–Њ–љ—В–∞–љ–љ–Њ, –љ–µ –≤—Б–µ —Г—Б–њ–µ–≤–∞—О—В –Њ –љ–Є—Е —Г–Ј–љ–∞—В—М, –љ–µ –≤—Б–µ –Љ–Њ–≥—Г—В –њ—А–Є–є—В–Є, –∞ –Љ–љ–Њ–≥–Є–µ –њ—А–Њ—Б—В–Њ –±–Њ—П—В—Б—П. –Я–Њ—Н—В–Њ–Љ—Г –≤ —Н—В–Њ—В —А–∞–Ј –Љ—Л –њ–Њ—Б—В—Г–њ–Є–Љ –Є–љ–∞—З–µ. 

–Ь—Л –љ–µ –љ–∞–Ј–љ–∞—З–∞–µ–Љ —Б–µ–є—З–∞—Б –Ї–Њ–љ–Ї—А–µ—В–љ–Њ–є –і–∞—В—Л.¬†–Я–µ—А–≤—Л–є —И–∞–≥ –љ–∞—И–µ–є –Ї–∞–Љ–њ–∞–љ–Є–Є вАФ —А–∞—Б—Б–Ї–∞–Ј–∞—В—М –Њ –Љ–Є—В–Є–љ–≥–µ –≤—Б–µ–є —Б—В—А–∞–љ–µ.¬†–Т—Б–µ –≤–Љ–µ—Б—В–µ –Љ—Л –і–Њ–ї–ґ–љ—Л –Ј–∞–љ—П—В—М—Б—П –Є–љ—Д–Њ—А–Љ–Є—А–Њ–≤–∞–љ–Є–µ–Љ –Є –њ–Њ–і–≥–Њ—В–Њ–≤–Ї–Њ–є, –∞ –і–∞—В—Г –Љ—Л –Њ–њ—А–µ–і–µ–ї–Є–Љ, –Ї–Њ–≥–і–∞ —З–Є—Б–ї–Њ —Г—З–∞—Б—В–љ–Є–Ї–Њ–≤ –і–Њ—Б—В–Є–≥–љ–µ—В –њ–Њ –Ї—А–∞–є–љ–µ–є –Љ–µ—А–µ 500 —В—Л—Б—П—З —З–µ–ї–Њ–≤–µ–Ї.

–Э–∞¬†—Б–∞–є—В–µ  https://free.navalny.com ¬†–Љ—Л¬†–Ј–∞–њ—Г—Б—В–Є–ї–Є –Ї–∞—А—В—Г. –Х—Б–ї–Є –≤—Л¬†—Б—З–Є—В–∞–µ—В–µ, —З—В–Њ –Р–ї–µ–Ї—Б–µ–є –Э–∞–≤–∞–ї—М–љ—Л–є –і–Њ–ї–ґ–µ–љ –±—Л—В—М –љ–µ–Љ–µ–і–ї–µ–љ–љ–Њ –Њ—Б–≤–Њ–±–Њ–ґ–і–µ–љ, –Є¬†–≥–Њ—В–Њ–≤—Л —В—А–µ–±–Њ–≤–∞—В—М —Н—В–Њ–≥–Њ –љ–∞¬†—Г–ї–Є—Ж–µ, —В–Њ¬†–њ–Њ—Б—В–∞–≤—М—В–µ —В–Њ—З–Ї—Г –≤¬†–≥–Њ—А–Њ–і–µ, –≥–і–µ –≤—Л¬†–ґ–Є–≤–µ—В–µ. –Ъ–∞—А—В–∞ –±—Г–і–µ—В –Ј–∞–њ–Њ–ї–љ—П—В—М—Б—П —В–Њ—З–Ї–∞–Љ–Є, –Є¬†–Ї–∞–ґ–і—Л–є, –Ї—В–Њ –њ–Њ—Б—В–∞–≤–Є—В —Б–≤–Њ—О, –±—Г–і–µ—В –Ј–љ–∞—В—М, —З—В–Њ –Њ–љ¬†–љ–µ¬†–Њ–і–Є–љ–Њ–Ї. –І—В–Њ –њ—А—П–Љ–Њ —А—П–і–Њ–Љ —Б¬†–љ–Є–Љ –ґ–Є–≤—Г—В –µ–і–Є–љ–Њ–Љ—Л—И–ї–µ–љ–љ–Є–Ї–Є¬†вАФ –≤¬†—В–Њ–Љ –ґ–µ¬†–і–≤–Њ—А–µ, –љ–∞¬†—В–Њ–є –ґ–µ¬†—Г–ї–Є—Ж–µ. –Ш¬†–Ї–Њ–≥–і–∞ –љ–∞—Б —Б—В–∞–љ–µ—В –і–Њ—Б—В–∞—В–Њ—З–љ–Њ –Љ–љ–Њ–≥–Њ, –Љ—Л¬†–њ—А–Њ–є–і–µ–Љ –Љ–Є—А–љ—Л–Љ —И–µ—Б—В–≤–Є–µ–Љ –њ–Њ¬†—Г–ї–Є—Ж–∞–Љ –≤—Б–µ—Е —А–Њ—Б—Б–Є–є—Б–Ї–Є—Е –≥–Њ—А–Њ–і–Њ–≤.

–Э–µ –±–Њ–є—В–µ—Б—М.¬†–†–µ–≥–Є—Б—В—А–Є—А—Г–є—В–µ—Б—М. –Я—А–Є—Б–Њ–µ–і–Є–љ—П–є—В–µ—Б—М –Ї –љ–∞—И–µ–є –Ї–∞–Љ–њ–∞–љ–Є–Є.

snippet.title: Squishy Makeovers:  Easter Edition
snippet.description:
Welcome to another episode of squishy makeovers, where I transform ugly, used, old, dirty, cheap or unwanted squishies (donated by my subscribers) into my own creations. I repair, paint and cut away for hours on end to complete these. Hopefully you like them. Get used to lots of rainbow and sprinkles, because I am addicted to both!

PRE-ORDER THE LIMITED EDITION RUBIK'S CUBE:
https://www.moriah-rubiks.com/

_________FAQs__________

1. CAN I SEND YOU SQUISHIES?
So many generous people have sent me their unwanted squishies so I actually have a lot to work on already, BUT if you desperately want to, you can request my mailing address in the email ALLLL the way at down in the description (sorry for the traveling), make sure to read the disclaimer down there as well.

2. ARE SQUISHIES RETURNED TO THE SENDERS AFTER THE MAKEOVER?
No. These squishies  are sent as donations to the series because they were damaged, and no longer wanted. Everyone has been informed in advance that squishies would not be returned. It would be waaay too complicated/expensive and massively time consuming to keep track of everyone and return each squishy. I'm just one person! 

3. WHAT PAINT DO YOU USE?
I use fabric paint. Fabric paint is meant to stretch, so it is perfect for squishing! Any brand will work fine, but I mainly use Tulip. You can find it at Michaels, Hobby Lobby, A.C. Moore, Walmart, Joann Fabrics, and Online.

5. WILL FABRIC PAINT CRACK?
The matte fabric paint is more likely to crack after lots of squishing. Slick fabric paints never crack. But there are benefits to both. I usually mix the two paints together to get the best of both worlds.

6. CAN I USE ACRYLIC PAINT ON SQUISHIES?
I would not recommend that. Acrylic paint will either make the squishy hard, or it will crack and flake off very easily. 



___________WELCOME TO MY CHANNEL__________

Hey! my name is Moriah (pronounced muh-rye-yuh рЯШВ ) and this is my channel....obviously. I'm 26 and like doing anything creative...and being snarky.....just a lil. I make a lot of decorating, painting and general art videos here. I'm obsessed with editing and adding lil bits to my videos, so if that's not your thing....oof you may hate this haha. I paint on squishies, thrift store finds, and other random things I pick up. I also love to draw, but don't expect anything too skilled, I'm not the best at that haha. You will also find occasional crafting/testing crafting kits on my channel which are always a hot mess. And even some baking (REALLY bad at that, but it's fun to try LOL). 

CURRENT SERIES:
Squishy Makeovers: Fixing and decorating used squishies sent from my viewers
Thrift Store Makeovers: Fixing and decorating stuff I find at thrift stores/yard sales
Bake With ME: Recreating squishies I've decorated in real life
Create This Book: Drawing in the prompt book that I wrote (available to purchase and follow along)
Squishy Unboxing: Opening used squishy packages sent from viewers
Craft Kit Testing: pretty self explanatory. testing craft kits.

Find Products I Use (contains affiliate links):
https://a.co/4XDtrmV


___UPLOAD SCHEDULE___

Every Friday at 4:00pm ET: Alternating Squishy Makeovers, Thrift Makeovers, Craft Kit Reviews, Create This Book, Mail Openings and Miscellaneous crafts and DIYs


____PURCHASE ME PRODUCTS____

CREATE THIS BOOK:
https://amzn.to/2vUerfI

CREATE THIS BOOK 2:
https://amzn.to/2Nx2G9f

ME Custom Merchandise:
https://moriahelizabethmerch.com/

ME Pin & Sticker Shop:
https://me-merch.myshopify.com

ME Printed Apparel and Accessories:
https://moriah-elizabeth.teespring.com/


____ME SOCIALS____

INSTAGRAM: 
https://www.instagram.com/moriahelizabethofficial/

TIKTOK:
https://www.tiktok.com/@me.moriah.elizabeth

FACEBOOK:
https://www.facebook.com/Moriah-Elizabeth-102592864903627

SNAPCHAT:
MoriahOfficial

VISIT ME WEBSITE:
https://www.moriahelizabeth.com/


____CONTACT ME____

EMAIL PICTURES OF YOUR ART (Create This Book or Fan art only please):
Artwork@Moriah.video

FOR BUSINESS INQUIRIES/OPPORTUNITIES ONLY:
moriah@nightmedia.co


_____MAIL ME_____

For sending squishies, Letters, or general fan mail, please contact: FANMAIL@MORIAH.VIDEO to request my P.O. box address 
(must be 13+ to send mail)
ATTENTION: Unfortunately I can only respond to a small amount of people each week. This is to make sure that I get a reasonable amount of mail and can feature the maximum amount on camera. I apologize in advance if you do not hear back from me, I may not have even seen the message. This email gets SUPER clogged with thousands of messages. Currently have 15,000+ unread messages just in this folder. SORRY PEEPS!*

en.title: Squishy Makeovers:  Easter Edition
en.description:
Welcome to another episode of squishy makeovers, where I transform ugly, used, old, dirty, cheap or unwanted squishies (donated by my subscribers) into my own creations. I repair, paint and cut away for hours on end to complete these. Hopefully you like them. Get used to lots of rainbow and sprinkles, because I am addicted to both!

PRE-ORDER THE LIMITED EDITION RUBIK'S CUBE:
https://www.moriah-rubiks.com/

_________FAQs__________

1. CAN I SEND YOU SQUISHIES?
So many generous people have sent me their unwanted squishies so I actually have a lot to work on already, BUT if you desperately want to, you can request my mailing address in the email ALLLL the way at down in the description (sorry for the traveling), make sure to read the disclaimer down there as well.

2. ARE SQUISHIES RETURNED TO THE SENDERS AFTER THE MAKEOVER?
No. These squishies  are sent as donations to the series because they were damaged, and no longer wanted. Everyone has been informed in advance that squishies would not be returned. It would be waaay too complicated/expensive and massively time consuming to keep track of everyone and return each squishy. I'm just one person! 

3. WHAT PAINT DO YOU USE?
I use fabric paint. Fabric paint is meant to stretch, so it is perfect for squishing! Any brand will work fine, but I mainly use Tulip. You can find it at Michaels, Hobby Lobby, A.C. Moore, Walmart, Joann Fabrics, and Online.

5. WILL FABRIC PAINT CRACK?
The matte fabric paint is more likely to crack after lots of squishing. Slick fabric paints never crack. But there are benefits to both. I usually mix the two paints together to get the best of both worlds.

6. CAN I USE ACRYLIC PAINT ON SQUISHIES?
I would not recommend that. Acrylic paint will either make the squishy hard, or it will crack and flake off very easily. 



___________WELCOME TO MY CHANNEL__________

Hey! my name is Moriah (pronounced muh-rye-yuh рЯШВ ) and this is my channel....obviously. I'm 26 and like doing anything creative...and being snarky.....just a lil. I make a lot of decorating, painting and general art videos here. I'm obsessed with editing and adding lil bits to my videos, so if that's not your thing....oof you may hate this haha. I paint on squishies, thrift store finds, and other random things I pick up. I also love to draw, but don't expect anything too skilled, I'm not the best at that haha. You will also find occasional crafting/testing crafting kits on my channel which are always a hot mess. And even some baking (REALLY bad at that, but it's fun to try LOL). 

CURRENT SERIES:
Squishy Makeovers: Fixing and decorating used squishies sent from my viewers
Thrift Store Makeovers: Fixing and decorating stuff I find at thrift stores/yard sales
Bake With ME: Recreating squishies I've decorated in real life
Create This Book: Drawing in the prompt book that I wrote (available to purchase and follow along)
Squishy Unboxing: Opening used squishy packages sent from viewers
Craft Kit Testing: pretty self explanatory. testing craft kits.

Find Products I Use (contains affiliate links):
https://a.co/4XDtrmV


___UPLOAD SCHEDULE___

snippet.title: Lamborghini Urus v BMW X6M - DRAG RACE
snippet.description:
Head to http://bit.ly/-Spring-Event to check out a load of all-new carwow Spring Deals! Be quick though - theyвАЩre only there until March 31st! 
.............................................................

Check out Yiannimize - http://youtube.com/yiannimize

ItвАЩs Saturday morning, so you know what time it isвА¶ Time for another Mat vs Yianni showdown!! 

WeвАЩve got a BMW X6M Competition going up against a Lamborghini Urus (no prizes for guessing whoвАЩs in which car)! These two SUV heavyweights are going head-to-head over the quarter-mile, and when looking at stats alone, you might think itвАЩll be an easy win for the Urus! 

Under the LamboвАЩs bonnet, youвАЩll find a 4-litre twin-turbo V8 which can deliver 650hp and 850Nm. As for the BMW, it may pack a 4.4-litre twin-turbo V8, but it only puts down 625hp & 750Nm! But thatвАЩs not allвА¶ The Urus is also 200kg lighter than the X6M! 

Now, of course, we know the BMW has one trick up its sleeve - an EPIC launch system! The question is, will it be enough to snatch the win on this wet track? ThereвАЩs only one way to find outвА¶ LETвАЩS RACE!

.............................................................

snippet.title: Perseverance RoverвАЩs Descent and Touchdown on Mars (Official NASA Video)
snippet.description:
NASA's Mars 2020 Perseverance mission captured thrilling footage of its rover landing in Mars' Jezero Crater on Feb. 18, 2021.  The real footage in this video was captured by several cameras that are part of the rover's entry, descent, and landing suite. The views include a camera looking down from the spacecraft's descent stage (a kind of rocket-powered jet pack that helps fly the rover to its landing site), a camera on the rover looking up at the descent stage, a camera on the top of the aeroshell (a capsule protecting the rover) looking up at that parachute, and a camera on the bottom of the rover looking down at the Martian surface.
 
The audio embedded in the video comes from the mission control call-outs during entry, descent, and landing. 
 
For more information about Perseverance, visit https://mars.nasa.gov/perseverance
 
Credit: NASA/JPL-Caltech

snippet.title: I'm back.
snippet.description:
Schlatt moves to Texas. Texas starts snowing. Life is suffering.

Follow me on Twitter:
https://twitter.com/jschlatt

Follow me on Instagram:
https://instagram.com/jschlatt

Schlatt is in Texas and Texas is in Schlatt but I wish it was 10 Big Hot Men in me instead. Hello from the deep south! In this commentary video Schlatt talks about stuff for 8 minutes and change, which is just long enough to pollute the video with multiple midroll ads to make as much money as possible. He talks about the awful Texas Snowstorm 2021, which left millions of people out of power thanks to Ercot - kind of like when Schlatt has a heart attack and perishes on the Dream SMP! I put TommyInnit in the video for half a second just so I can also include him in the description. Maybe I should've titled this Commentary Video "Minecraft's Snowstorm Mod Is Incredibly Funny," and then the thumbnail is Schlatt in a red shirt. Who Is Ranboo? I Still Don't Know. I'm old and grumpy and in Texas with my best friends Mizkif, Trainwrecks, Pokelawls, Esfand, and Marriott International. The power in my house is out but At Least I Have My Blankets. It's almost like I brought the cold weather down south with me. If only I could bring the pizza and bagels with me, too -- maybe have a good old New York Slice of Pizza Pie at my favorite New York City Bodega with New York City Mayoral Candidate Andrew "Chicken Soup" Yang. Better yet, me and Davey Pageviews go out to John's at Bleecker Street, get a 10/10 and then day trade some no-name pink sheet company up 500% by closing. That's what I call a Portnoy Pump! /j /hj /ij /lh

snippet.title: Manizha - Russian Woman - Russia рЯЗЈрЯЗЇ - Official Video - Eurovision 2021
snippet.description:
Manizha will represent Russia at the Eurovision Song Contest 2021 with the song Russian Woman.

-
Lyrics:
Fields, fields, fields
IвАЩm so small
Fields, fields, fields
IвАЩm too small
How do you cross a field through the fire?
How do you cross the field when youвАЩre alone?

Heeeey?
Should I wait for a helpful hand?
What?
Who will reach out for me, girls?

For ages now
From night till dawn
From the deepest of the night
We are waiting for a ship
A sailing ship
Waiting very much
From night till dawn
Waiting for a ship
Waiting for a ship
But whatвАЩs the wait?
Stand up, letвАЩs go!

Every Russian woman
needs to know
You strong enough to bounce against the wall

WhatвАЩs the rattling about?
Hey, beauty!
Are you waiting for your prince?
Hey, beauty!

YouвАЩre 30!
Hello? Where are your kids?
You are cute overall
But should lose some weight
Wear something longer
Wear something shorter
Oh you grew up without a father?
You should do what you donвАЩt want to

You sure you donвАЩt want to?
DonвАЩt want to?
You SHOULD!

Listen up, really!
WeвАЩre not a flock
Hey, crows, shoo!
Leave me alone (give me a break)
Now learn it by heart:
I donвАЩt blame you for one bit
But I just love myself more

They just fight, always fight
Go round and round to just fight
But never pray
Boy without a father
Girl with no dad
But this broken family
CanвАЩt break me

-

If you want to know more about the Eurovision Song Contest, visit https://eurovision.tv

Shop the official Eurovision Song Contest merchandise: https://shop.eurovision.tv/
Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/eurovision 
Follow us on Twitter: https://twitter.com/Eurovision
Follow us on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/EurovisionSongContest/

snippet.title: Jeremy Clarkson reveals details about future episodes of The Grand Tour
snippet.description:
With the first quarter of 2021 coming to a close, we decided to grab each of the DriveTribe founders for an update of their year so far, as well as looking forward to their plans for the rest of the year. After getting an update from Hammond (link to that video is below) we then travelled to Clarkson's farm to see how Jeremy has been and to hear what he has in store for the months to come.

Enter our competition for a chance at winning a Tesla Model 3 or ¬£40k cash! http://bit.ly/DTwinTeslaвАЛ

UK 18+, purchase necessary, competition ends 23:59 BST 14/06/21. 
Click this link for full terms: https://bit.ly/TeslaTerms

Watch Richard Hammond's 2021 update: https://youtu.be/H7A1ggG7BBA

After getting an update from Hammond (link to that video is below) we then travelled to Clarkson's farm to see how Jeremy has been and to hear what he has in store for the months to come.

snippet.title: –У–і–µ –Э–∞–≤–∞–ї—М–љ—Л–є? –Ґ—О—А–µ–Љ–љ—Л–є –∞–і –і–ї—П –≥–ї–∞–≤–љ–Њ–≥–Њ –≤—А–∞–≥–∞ –Я—Г—В–Є–љ–∞
snippet.description:
–Я–Њ—Б–ї–µ–і–љ–Є–µ –і–љ–Є –≤—Б–µ –њ—Л—В–∞—О—В—Б—П –њ–Њ–љ—П—В—М, –≥–і–µ –Р–ї–µ–Ї—Б–µ–є –Э–∞–≤–∞–ї—М–љ—Л–є. –Э–∞ —Н—В–Њ—В –≤–Њ–њ—А–Њ—Б –Њ–і–љ–Њ–≤—А–µ–Љ–µ–љ–љ–Њ –µ—Б—В—М –Њ—В–≤–µ—В –Є –љ–µ—В. –Ф–∞, —В–∞–Ї –±—Л–≤–∞–µ—В. –Э–Є –∞–і–≤–Њ–Ї–∞—В—Л –Р–ї–µ–Ї—Б–µ—П, –љ–Є –µ–≥–Њ —А–Њ–і—Б—В–≤–µ–љ–љ–Є–Ї–Є вАФ –љ–Є–Ї—В–Њ –љ–µ –±—Л–ї —Г–≤–µ–і–Њ–Љ–ї–µ–љ –Њ —В–Њ–Љ, —З—В–Њ –Э–∞–≤–∞–ї—М–љ–Њ–≥–Њ –њ–µ—А–µ–≤–Њ–і—П—В –Є–Ј ¬Ђ–Ь–∞—В—А–Њ—Б—Б–Ї–Њ–є –Ґ–Є—И–Є–љ—Л¬ї –Є –Ї—Г–і–∞-—В–Њ —Г–≤–Њ–Ј—П—В.¬†
–Ю—Д–Є—Ж–Є–∞–ї—М–љ–Њ–≥–Њ –Њ—В–≤–µ—В–∞ –Њ —В–Њ–Љ, –≥–і–µ –Р–ї–µ–Ї—Б–µ–є, –њ–Њ-–њ—А–µ–ґ–љ–µ–Љ—Г –љ–µ—В

–Э–Њ¬†–њ–∞—А–∞–ї–ї–µ–ї—М–љ–Њ —Б¬†—Н—В–Є–Љ¬†вАФ –њ–Њ—Б–Љ–Њ—В—А–Є—В–µ —Б–∞–Љ–Є.¬†–Ш—Б—В–Њ—З–љ–Є–Ї –љ–∞ –Є—Б—В–Њ—З–љ–Є–Ї–µ, –ґ—Г—А–љ–∞–ї–Є—Б—В—Л, –њ—А–∞–≤–Њ–Ј–∞—Й–Є—В–љ–Є–Ї–Є - –≤—Б–µ –≥–Њ–≤–Њ—А—П—В, —З—В–Њ –Э–∞–≤–∞–ї—М–љ—Л–є –±—Л–ї –і–Њ—Б—В–∞–≤–ї–µ–љ –≤–Њ –Т–ї–∞–і–Є–Љ–Є—А—Б–Ї—Г—О –Њ–±–ї–∞—Б—В—М. –°—А–Њ–Ї –Њ–љ –±—Г–і–µ—В –Њ—В–±—Л–≤–∞—В—М –≤ –≥–Њ—А–Њ–і–µ –Я–Њ–Ї—А–Њ–≤–µ, –Є—Б–њ—А–∞–≤–Є—В–µ–ї—М–љ–Њ–є –Ї–Њ–ї–Њ–љ–Є–Є вДЦ2.

–Ь—Л –њ–Њ–Ї–∞–ґ–µ–Љ –≤–∞–Љ, –Ї–∞–Ї —Н—В–Њ –Љ–µ—Б—В–Њ –≤—Л–≥–ї—П–і–Є—В –Є –Ї–∞–Ї —Г—Б—В—А–Њ–µ–љ–Њ. –І—В–Њ —В–∞–Ї–Њ–µ —А–Њ—Б—Б–Є–є—Б–Ї–∞—П —В—О—А—М–Љ–∞, –Є –Ї–∞–Ї –Я—Г—В–Є–љ —А–µ—И–Є–ї –Љ—Б—В–Є—В—М –Э–∞–≤–∞–ї—М–љ–Њ–Љ—Г –і–∞–ї—М—И–µ.¬†

–Ш–љ—Б—В–∞–≥—А–∞–Љ –Р–ї–µ–Ї—Б–µ—П –Э–∞–≤–∞–ї—М–љ–Њ–≥–Њ вАФ https://www.instagram.com/navalny/

–С–ї–Њ–≥ –Р–ї–µ–Ї—Б–µ—П –Э–∞–≤–∞–ї—М–љ–Њ–≥–Њ https://navalny.com/
–§–µ–є—Б–±—Г–Ї вАФ https://www.facebook.com/navalny/

snippet.description: 29-–ї–µ—В–љ—П—П –Ґ–∞—В—М—П–љ–∞ –Ш–≤–∞–љ–Є—Й–µ–≤–∞ —Б —В—А–µ–Љ—П –і–µ—В—М–Љ–Є –љ–∞ —А—Г–Ї–∞—Е —Б—В–∞–ї–∞ –±–Њ–Љ–ґ–Њ–Љ, –њ–Њ—В–Њ–Љ—Г —З—В–Њ —А–Њ–і–љ–∞—П –Љ–∞—В—М –Ь–∞—А–Є—П –Р–љ–∞—В–Њ–ї—М–µ–≤–љ–∞ –≤—Л–≥–љ–∞–ї–∞ –µ–µ –љ–∞ —Г–ї–Є—Ж—Г. –Я–Њ —Б–ї–Њ–≤–∞–Љ –Ґ–∞—В—М—П–љ—Л, –Є–Ј-–Ј–∞ –Љ–∞—В–µ—А–Є –Њ–љ–∞ —З—Г—В—М –љ–µ –њ–Њ–Ї–Њ–љ—З–Є–ї–∞ –ґ–Є–Ј–љ—М —Б–∞–Љ–Њ—Г–±–Є–є—Б—В–≤–Њ–Љ, –∞ –Є–Ј-–Ј–∞ –≥–Њ–ї–Њ–і–∞ –µ–є –њ—А–Є—Е–Њ–і–Є–ї–Њ—Б—М —Б–њ–∞—В—М —Б –Љ—Г–ґ—З–Є–љ–∞–Љ–Є –Ј–∞ –њ—А–Њ–і—Г–Ї—В—Л. –Э–Њ –Ь–∞—А–Є—П –Р–љ–∞—В–Њ–ї—М–µ–≤–љ–∞ —Г—В–≤–µ—А–ґ–і–∞–µ—В, —З—В–Њ –і–Њ—З—М —Б–∞–Љ–∞ –Ј–∞–≥—Г–±–Є–ї–∞ —Б–≤–Њ—О –ґ–Є–Ј–љ—М, –≤–µ–і—М –µ–µ –±–Њ–ї—М—И–µ –Є–љ—В–µ—А–µ—Б—Г—О—В –Љ—Г–ґ—З–Є–љ—Л, —З–µ–Љ —Б–Њ–±—Б—В–≤–µ–љ–љ—Л–µ –і–µ—В–Є. –Р –Њ—В–µ—Ж –і–µ—В–µ–є –Р–ї–µ–Ї—Б–µ–є –Ш–≤–∞–љ–Є—Й–µ–≤ —Е–Њ—З–µ—В –ї–Є—И–Є—В—М –Ґ–∞—В—М—П–љ—Г —А–Њ–і–Є—В–µ–ї—М—Б–Ї–Є—Е –њ—А–∞–≤. –Т –њ—А–Њ–≥—А–∞–Љ–Љ–µ ¬Ђ–Ь—Г–ґ—Б–Ї–Њ–µ / –Ц–µ–љ—Б–Ї–Њ–µ¬ї: –≥–і–µ –і–Њ–ї–ґ–љ—Л –ґ–Є—В—М –і–µ—В–Є, —Б –Ї–µ–Љ –Ґ–∞—В—М—П–љ–∞ –Є–Ј–Љ–µ–љ—П–ї–∞ –Р–ї–µ–Ї—Б–µ—О –Є —З—В–Њ –њ–Њ–Ї–∞–ґ–µ—В —В–µ—Б—В –Ф–Э–Ъ?

snippet.title: Starship | SN10 | High-Altitude Flight Test
snippet.description:
On Wednesday, March 3, Starship serial number (SN10) successfully completed SpaceXвАЩs third high-altitude flight test of a Starship prototype from our site in Cameron County, Texas.

Similar to the high-altitude flight tests of Starship SN8 and SN9, SN10 was powered through ascent by three Raptor engines, each shutting down in sequence prior to the vehicle reaching apogee вАУ approximately 10 km in altitude. SN10 performed a propellant transition to the internal header tanks, which hold landing propellant, before reorienting itself for reentry and a controlled aerodynamic descent.
  
The Starship prototype descended under active aerodynamic control, accomplished by independent movement of two forward and two aft flaps on the vehicle. All four flaps were actuated by an onboard flight computer to control StarshipвАЩs attitude during flight and enabled a precise landing at the intended location. SN10вАЩs Raptor engines reignited as the vehicle performed the landing flip maneuver immediately before successfully touching down on the landing pad! 

As if the flight test was not exciting enough, SN10 experienced a rapid unscheduled disassembly shortly after landing. These test flights are all about improving our understanding and development of a fully reusable transportation system designed to carry both crew and cargo on long-duration interplanetary flights, and help humanity return to the Moon, and travel to Mars and beyond.

snippet.title: The Most Popular Car in Every Country
snippet.description:
Thanks to RAID: Shadow Legends for sponsoring todayвАЩs video. Install Raid for Free вЬЕ IOS/ANDROID/PC https://clcr.me/Mar_DonutMedia  & get a special starter pack рЯТ• Available only for the next 30 days

Turns out everyone loves cars, so we got curious: what's the most popular car in EVERY country? How many countries even ARE there? Well it turns out both of those questions are more complicated than you'd think, but we did our best to find out for all 196 countries! Hopefully this helps you with Geoguessr, this is the D-List!

And if you're curious, most of this data is based on recent sales figures, but not every country makes this info publicly available. There are some not-very-recent cars on this list and also some joke cars, because making jokey car videos is what we do.

Images used in this video are courtesy of respective automakers or public domain.

Boris travels to Spain to review food and make tier list. Spain off season and during pandemic is like the Chernobyl of west Europe. And it is glorious! But first we eat!

Boris grades all food into 3 tiers:
JUST LIKE HOME
WHY DONT WE HAVE THIS
AT LEAST LOCALS LIKE IT

snippet.description: 33-–ї–µ—В–љ—П—П –Т–Є–Ї—В–Њ—А–Є—П –¶–≤–µ—В–Њ–≤–∞ –Є–Ј –†–Њ—Б—В–Њ–≤—Б–Ї–Њ–є –Њ–±–ї–∞—Б—В–Є —Е–Њ—З–µ—В –ї–Є—И–Є—В—М –±—Л–≤—И–µ–≥–Њ —Б–Њ–ґ–Є—В–µ–ї—П —А–Њ–і–Є—В–µ–ї—М—Б–Ї–Є—Е –њ—А–∞–≤ –љ–∞ —З–µ—В–≤–µ—А—Л—Е –і–µ—В–µ–є. –Т–Є–Ї—В–Њ—А–Є—П —Г—В–≤–µ—А–ґ–і–∞–µ—В, —З—В–Њ –Ф–ґ–Њ–љ–Є–±–µ–Ї –љ–µ —Г—З–∞—Б—В–≤—Г–µ—В –≤ –Є—Е –ґ–Є–Ј–љ–Є –Є –љ–µ –њ–ї–∞—В–Є—В –∞–ї–Є–Љ–µ–љ—В—Л. –Р –Ф–ґ–Њ–љ–Є–±–µ–Ї —Г—В–≤–µ—А–ґ–і–∞–µ—В, —З—В–Њ –±—Л–≤—И–∞—П –ґ–µ–љ–∞ –њ—А–Њ—Б—В–Њ –Љ—Б—В–Є—В –µ–Љ—Г –Ј–∞ —В–Њ, —З—В–Њ –Њ–љ –±—А–Њ—Б–Є–ї —Б–µ–Љ—М—О —А–∞–і–Є –µ–µ –ї—Г—З—И–µ–є –њ–Њ–і—А—Г–≥–Є. –Т —Б—В—Г–і–Є–Є –њ—А–Њ–≥—А–∞–Љ–Љ—Л ¬Ђ–Ь—Г–ґ—Б–Ї–Њ–µ / –Ц–µ–љ—Б–Ї–Њ–µ¬ї –њ—А–Њ–±—Г—О—В —А–∞–Ј–Њ–±—А–∞—В—М—Б—П, –њ–Њ—З–µ–Љ—Г –Ф–ґ–Њ–љ–Є–±–µ–Ї –њ—А–µ–і–∞–ї –ґ–µ–љ—Й–Є–љ—Г, –Ї–Њ—В–Њ—А–∞—П —А–Њ–і–Є–ї–∞ –µ–Љ—Г —З–µ—В–≤–µ—А—Л—Е –і–µ—В–µ–є, –Ї–∞–Ї –ї—Г—З—И–∞—П –њ–Њ–і—А—Г–≥–∞ —Г–≤–µ–ї–∞ –Љ—Г–ґ–∞ —Г –Т–Є–Ї—В–Њ—А–Є–Є, –Є —Б—В–Њ–Є—В –ї–Є –ї–Є—И–∞—В—М –Ф–ґ–Њ–љ–Є–±–µ–Ї–∞ —А–Њ–і–Є—В–µ–ї—М—Б–Ї–Є—Е –њ—А–∞–≤.

–Т—Б–µ–Љ –Ј–і–∞—А–Њ–≤–∞! –І—В–Њ –≤—Л –Ј–љ–∞–µ—В–µ –њ—А–Њ —А–Њ–Ј–µ—В–Ї—Г? –Ъ–Њ–љ–µ—З–љ–Њ, –≤—Л –Ј–љ–∞–µ—В–µ, —З—В–Њ —Н—В–Њ –Њ–њ–∞—Б–љ–∞—П —И—В—Г–Ї–∞, –≤ –Ї–Њ—В–Њ—А—Г—О –љ–µ–ї—М–Ј—П –Ј–∞—Б–Њ–≤—Л–≤–∞—В—М –љ–Є–Ї–∞–Ї–Є–µ –њ–Њ—Б—В–Њ—А–Њ–љ–љ–Є–µ –њ—А–µ–і–Љ–µ—В—Л, –≤–Ї–ї—О—З–∞—П –≤–∞—И–Є –њ–∞–ї—М—Ж—Л! –Ґ–∞–Ї–ґ–µ –≤—Л –Ј–љ–∞–µ—В–µ, —З—В–Њ –Є–Ј —А–Њ–Ј–µ—В–Ї–Є –±–µ—А–µ—В—Б—П —Н–ї–µ–Ї—В—А–Є—З–µ—Б—В–≤–Њ, –Њ—В –Ї–Њ—В–Њ—А–Њ–≥–Њ —А–∞–±–Њ—В–∞–µ—В –≤—Б—П —В–µ—Е–љ–Є–Ї–∞! –Э–Њ —П —А–µ—И–Є–ї –њ—А–Њ–≤–µ—Б—В–Є —Б —А–Њ–Ј–µ—В–Ї–Њ–є –љ–µ—Б–Ї–Њ–ї—М–Ї–Њ –Є–љ—В–µ—А–µ—Б–љ—Л—Е —Н–Ї—Б–њ–µ—А–Є–Љ–µ–љ—В–Њ–≤! –Ш —П, –Ї–∞–Ї —А–∞–Ј-—В–∞–Ї–Є, –±—Г–і—Г –Ј–∞—Б–Њ–≤—Л–≤–∞—В—М –≤ –љ–µ–µ –≤—Б–µ, —З—В–Њ —В—Г–і–∞ –Ј–∞—Б–Њ–≤—Л–≤–∞—В—М –љ–µ–ї—М–Ј—ПвА¶ –Ъ —В–Њ–Љ—Г –ґ–µ, –Љ–љ–µ —Б—В–∞–ї–Њ –Є–љ—В–µ—А–µ—Б–љ–Њ, —З—В–Њ –±—Г–і–µ—В, –µ—Б–ї–Є —А–Њ–Ј–µ—В–Ї—Г –њ–Њ–і–Ї–ї—О—З–Є—В—М –ЇвА¶ –Ф—А—Г–≥–Њ–є —А–Њ–Ј–µ—В–Ї–µ! –Ф–∞! –ѓ –і–∞–ґ–µ –љ–µ –њ—А–µ–і—Б—В–∞–≤–ї—П—О, —З—В–Њ –Љ–Њ–ґ–µ—В –њ—А–Њ–Є–Ј–Њ–є—В–Є! –Э–Њ —П –љ–∞–њ–Њ–Љ–Є–љ–∞—О, —З—В–Њ –≤–∞–Љ —В–∞–Ї–Њ–µ –љ–Є –≤ –Ї–Њ–µ–Љ —Б–ї—Г—З–∞–µ –њ–Њ–≤—В–Њ—А—П—В—М –љ–µ–ї—М–Ј—П! –Т—Л –Љ–Њ–ґ–µ—В–µ –њ–Њ—Б–Љ–Њ—В—А–µ—В—М –≤—Б–µ —А–µ–Ј—Г–ї—М—В–∞—В—Л –≤ –љ–∞—И–µ–Љ –≤–Є–і–µ–Њ—А–Њ–ї–Є–Ї–µ! –Я—А–Є—П—В–љ–Њ–≥–Њ –њ—А–Њ—Б–Љ–Њ—В—А–∞!

snippet.title: POLICE vs SPY NINJAS - Escaping Prison and Hiding Underground from a SWAT Team!
snippet.description:
HIDING FROM SWAT TEAM

After Chad Wild Clay made "BREAKING INTO PRISON TO HELP MY FRIEND ESCAPE", Vy Qwaint created "CAN I ESCAPE PRISON? Breaking Out of Jail Using Spy Ninjas Sneaking Skills", Daniel Gizmo uploaded "WE MESSED UP... (we're sorry)", and Melvin PZ9 filmed "DO SPY NINJAS GO TO HEAVEN If You Beat Roblox?", the Spy Ninjas have to hide from the SWAT team! After escaping prison, these fugitives are on the run and the first thing they need to do is protect the Chef! That way the Chef can reveal up valuable information and put an end to the Stalker once and for all! Except, the Swat team doesn't know that yet, and they are on the hunt for all escaped convicts. Daniel gets split up from the group and has to defend himself. Can he fight off a trained Swat team member? Or can he get creative and escape from them again? Chad and the Chef get split up as well, and they need to hide too. Using Chad's strength, he helps remove the handcuffs off the Chef. Next, he uses a Drone to chase around the Swat and saves Daniel. After dodging the Swat team and distracting them a couple of times, they finally corner Chad and the Chef. Is it the end? Or does Daniel returns his favor and saves Chad and the Chef with his master plan. Except, it doesn't go that way and suddenly something mysterious and shocking happens at the end. Leave a comment below on what you think happens next! Thank you for watching my funny entertainment comedy adventure vlog videos in 2021!

snippet.title: Why Some Supercars Take More Than Money To Buy
snippet.description:
Thank you to Raycon for sponsoring todayвАЩs video! To get premium audio in your life, go to https://buyraycon.com/donut for 15% off your order!

Supercars are some of the most exclusive cars in the world, with pricetags often in the hundred of thousands if not millions of dollars. But in this scene, just because you have the money to pay for it, doesn't mean you can buy it. Find out which brands are the "easiest" to buy, does Ferrari have a secret buyers list, and how to buy a hypercar before its even announced!

Special thanks to Misha Mansoor, you can check out Horizon Devices here https://horizondevices.com/ and GetGood Drums here https://www.getgooddrums.com/

Special thanks to Amber Blonigan for your invaluable help on this video!

New to the Channel?
